title: Mutation Input Contract Schema
description: Schema for validating residue-derived mutation input payloads.

mutation_input_id.description: Unique identifier for this mutation input payload.

tower_state_id.description: ID of the tower state this input is derived from.

content_pack_id.description: ID of the content pack this input is associated with.

floor_id.description: The floor ID this input pertains to.

source_outcome.description: The outcome that generated this mutation input.

residue_summary.description: Summarized residue data for mutation calculation.

dominant_damage_type.description: Dominant damage type from the residue.

dominant_play_pattern.description: Dominant play pattern from the residue (e.g., aggressive, cautious).

party_size.description: Number of players in the party.

visit_count.description: Number of times the floor was visited.

eligible_mutation_channels.description: List of mutation channels that are eligible for this input.

mutation_constraints.description: Constraints applied to the mutation process.

must_preserve_floor_identity.description: If true, the floor's core identity must be preserved during mutation.

must_remain_playable.description: If true, the mutated floor must remain playable and not become a dead-end.

may_increase_difficulty.description: If true, the mutation process is allowed to increase floor difficulty.

may_reveal_rewards.description: If true, the mutation process is allowed to reveal new rewards.
